channel.title: Opencv Hu Features Motion History Images on Warren Wilkinson
channel.description: Recent content in Opencv Hu Features Motion History Images on Warren Wilkinson

item.title: Motion History Classifier; Classifying Video
item.description: Motion history images are motion-blurred silhouettes. Here is an example. The original is on the left, the background is removed, A cleaned-up mask produced. The resulting motion history images are the frames off the animation on the right. Hu Moments and Classification The Hu moments of the motion history image can be computed using OpenCV (or other libraries, or by hand). These seven moments can be used as a feature vector in classification tasks.
